Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Tamara]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Tamara is Alin's oldest sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Tamara is a character who interacts with Alin and Grandmaster Naraka.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Tamara is Alin's sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Tamara is a companion of Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Tamara is part of Alin's party and carries a seed to the Hanging Tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The Naraka Incarnation grabbed Tamara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Tamara was hit in the ribs by the Incarnation's flame-headed hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Tamara has a travel-bag.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Tamara is Alin's oldest sister who has died.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
